responsibilities: Design and implement star and snowflake schema data models that support enterprise reporting and analytics
Build and optimize data warehouse architecture to handle growing data volumes while maintaining query performance
Develop ETL processes that load data into the warehouse while enforcing data quality and consistency standards
Implement slowly changing dimension strategies to accurately track historical changes in business entities
Tune warehouse queries, indexing, and partitioning strategies to reduce report and dashboard load times
Migrate on-premise data warehouse systems to cloud platforms such as Snowflake, Redshift, or BigQuery
Collaborate with analytics engineers and BI developers to ensure warehouse models meet reporting requirements
Establish data retention, archiving, and partitioning policies to manage warehouse storage costs effectively
Monitor warehouse performance and capacity, proactively addressing bottlenecks before they impact users
Document data warehouse schema, ETL logic, and data lineage to support governance and troubleshooting
